{"problem_standardized_math":"Show that, for points of the form\n\\[\np=-\\tau_k\\frac{\\Delta_k}{\\|g_k\\|}g_k,\n\\]\nthe parameter\n\\[\n\\tau_k=\n\\begin{cases}\n1, & \\text{if } g_k^T B_k g_k\\le 0,\\\\\n\\min\\!\\left(\\dfrac{\\|g_k\\|^3}{\\Delta_k\\, g_k^T B_k g_k},1\\right), & \\text{otherwise}\n\\end{cases}\n\\tag{4.12}\n\\]\ndoes indeed identify the minimizer of \\(m_k\\) along the direction \\(-g_k\\)."}
